title: The Cushion
content:
Your arm should only be
    A spring night's dream;
    If I accepted it to rest my head upon
    There would be rumours
    And no delight.

    From the Japanese of the daughter of Taira-no Tsu-gu-naka.
meaning:
"The Cushion" is a quintessential example of Edward Powys Mathers (As Translator)'s signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
